response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and recent work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) aligns closely with GenAI requirements. However, his background lacks direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and enterprise-scale AI system delivery. His work with data pipelines and cloud platforms is implied but not explicitly demonstrated for GenAI use cases.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack engineering with TypeScript and cloud platforms (AWS, Node.js)
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams (e.g., GISCollective, Altom Consulting)
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in resume
Limited direct experience with multi-agent system frameworks (e.g., LangGraph, CrewAI)
Most recent AI-related work (re:cinq) is not detailed—lack of clarity on GenAI-specific delivery
